module.name: Data Filter Module
module.author: Wyclif
module.description: Provides access-basis mapping support for static Sihsalus runtime.

globalProperty.description: When the value is set to false, the user can view a record that they don't have access, this can arise if they have a filtered record's unique identifier or a link to it since filters are not applied when looking up records by id, it's highly recommended to always run in strict mode and only turn this off when running in a non-production environment.

When the value is set to true, whenever a new patient is created, they get linked to the location set on the authenticated user's context i.e. the location the user selects when logging into the reference application.
